title: An Act authorizing the town of Wayland Select Board to grant permission to use land for green burials

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Linsky of Natick and Senator Eldridge, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5485) of David Paul Linsky (by vote of the town) relative to permissions to use land for green burials in the town of Wayland.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in A-1
